meta.impact: Reduced rework and improved delivery efficiency by aligning UI patterns with front-end implementation early in the product lifecycle.
meta.disciplines: Visual consistency, Cross-platform UI, Design-to-development handoff
meta.notes: Contributed interaction and visual design to a large-scale, multi-platform hospitality app spanning pre-arrival, on-property, and in-transit guest experiences across multiple luxury resort brands. Delivered high-fidelity UI systems adaptable across mobile, tablet, and on-property contexts while collaborating closely with product and development teams. Supported system consistency, scalability, and brand differentiation across a complex ecosystem of travel touchpoints.

meta.impact: Increased payment conversion by 30% by redesigning key payment flows and improving UI clarity within the dashboard experience.
meta.notes: Led production-ready visual and UI design across web, mobile apps, and AI chat experiences in a highly regulated healthcare environment. Designed and maintained WCAG 2.1–compliant components, layouts, and visual systems supporting marketing, product, and communications initiatives. Partnered cross-functionally with UX, Product, Engineering, Content, and Marketing to deliver dev-ready designs with minimal oversight, balancing accessibility, brand integrity, and speed at enterprise scale.

meta.impact: Increased user satisfaction by 40% by designing an app feature allowing offshore guests to communicate out-of-network
meta.disciplines: User flows, Interaction design, wireframes & prototypes
meta.notes: Designed and shipped a scalable social communication feature with cross-functional teams within a proprietary cruise app operating on a bandwidth-constrained ship network. Created wireframes, interaction flows and native visual assets, updated development repositories, and validated builds across emulators and actual devices.

meta.disciplines: Brand consistency, Print & digital production, Vendor coordination
meta.notes: Designed and executed a multi-platform exhibition campaign spanning print, digital, web, and email to promote a gallery exhibition within the South Florida arts community. Delivered cohesive visual storytelling across Miami Rail magazine ads, brochures, digital placements, and a custom-coded landing page, balancing curatorial intent with audience reach and production constraints.

meta.impact: Developed a flexible UI concept that allowed real-time interface customization, supporting sales conversations and product adaptability.

meta.disciplines: Creative direction, Integrated campaign design, Multi-channel production

meta.disciplines: HTML page reconstruction, Semantic markup, Accessibility compliance, Cross-browser QA
meta.notes: Supported a large-scale enterprise web migration by rebuilding legacy HTML pages into modern, standards-compliant layouts using semantic HTML and CSS. Ensured brand consistency, accessibility compliance, and cross-browser reliability while improving content structure, metadata, and long-term maintainability during a high-volume migration effort.

meta.disciplines: Design-to-code translation, Cross-browser support, Performance optimization
meta.notes: Modernized legacy, table-based web pages into semantic HTML and CSS for high-traffic cruise brand websites. meta.disciplines: Governance frameworks, Content inventory, Editorial guidelines
meta.notes: Created a content inventory and governance system to extract and standardize reusable assets across 88 national websites during a large-scale enterprise migration.
